sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105003" key="tri/kouros" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρί-κουρος·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁ ἐπὶ τρία ἔτη κεκ[αθ]αρμένος κριός, ὁμοίως καὶ ὁ μὴ κεκ[αθ]αρμένος,</foreign> Id.</entryFree>
